rationale: No conflict. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisal exemptions, while Educ. Code §29.365 governs education service provider pricing and refund prohibitions. The two provisions address unrelated subject matters.
quote: An education service provider or vendor of educational products may not charge a participating child an amount greater than the standard amount charged for that service or product by the provider or vendor.
_note: No textual or operational overlap between the proposed property-tax change and this education-program pricing rule.
